Dedicated dual-lens auto-tracking camera: a PTZ lens plus a wide panoramic lens, with on-camera facial-detection tracking and automatic switching between the two views. All tracking runs in the camera itself, with no external processor, dongle or PC application. Offers Stage, Everywhere and Partition tracking modes.
